// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable

namespace TestNs
{
    partial class MyControl
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Defines the <see cref="FontSize"/> property.
        /// </summary>
        public static readonly global::Avalonia.StyledProperty<double> FontSizeProperty =
            global::Avalonia.AvaloniaProperty.Register<global::TestNs.MyControl, double>(nameof(FontSize), inherits: true, defaultBindingMode: (global::Avalonia.Data.BindingMode)2);

        public partial double FontSize
        {
            get => GetValue(FontSizeProperty);
            set => SetValue(FontSizeProperty, value);
        }
    }
}
